title: Eva and Eva 2 Anthology
wikitext:
[]: Eva and Eva 2 Anthology.             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Apr 26, 2011 3:43 pm This is probably already the xxxth thread, but I could not find one after browsing through 5 pages worth of threads, so please merge this or something. Did anybody ever scan this? Does anyone here own this?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Apr 26, 2011 3:49 pm I haz a copy. What would you like to know? Don't ask me to translate, I only know minimal moonspeak.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 26, 2011 5:20 pm Ooh. Personally, I'm interested if the Eva 2 anthology has any Eva 2 game references or comics. Supposedly it does have parody comics, including one that was translated on EML of parodying how Shinji/Asuka/Rei can do whatever they want in the Eva-2 world. Only Shinji and Asuka stuff was translated, but hilarious. And supposedly Fumino Hayashi, the GoS2 manga-ka drew it?? I can't find the thread for it on EML anywhere, but I did copy/paste the text in a file sometime back, if it helps any: Eva2 Hilarity  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Apr 27, 2011 7:35 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I haz a copy. What would you like to know?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 27, 2011 10:32 am The Clone-Shinji (Good ol' AT-kun! T_T ) one is I believe from either the God's in His Heaven or All's Right With The World Gainax-endorsed Doujin Anthologies. 08/04/2011 Edit: It's from All's Right With the World. The second one that's an RPG parody is either from the Eva or Eva2 Manga Anthologies (well, it first appeared in either Shounen Ace or Young Ace ) but I'm not sure which one.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 03, 2011 11:24 pm Cross-post , more or less. Got this in the mail today. Don't mind the photo quality: camera phone and bad lighting in my room. Too bad I have no scanner. ___ Shinji has issues with Asuka being (partly) American, apparently. Asuka and Misato talk to him, Asuka caresses his cheek...Shinji loses it again and strangles her again. Bizarre but hilarious. (Asuka repeats "kimochi warui" ad nauseam. ) http://i74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Fandom/0803112036.jpg ___ "You can call me Papa if you like..." "Pa-papa?" (See here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=453722#453722 ) http://i74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Fandom/0803112026.jpg ___ Oh look, Fumino Hayashi (GoS2 manga-ka): http://i74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Fandom/0803112049.jpg ___ Oh look, Osamu Takahashi (Shinji Ikari Raising Project manga-ka): http://i74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Fandom/0803112050.jpg http://i74.photobucket.com/albums/i267/sailorstardust/Fandom/0803112050a.jpg
